touches.ai_summary: Cold outbound email to VP of CS at SwiftPartners introducing AskElephant as a pipeline visibility solution. Mentioned challenges with revenue forecasting accuracy in vertical SaaS environments. Recipient responded expressing interest in learning more about real-time deal insights.
next_steps: Schedule qualification call to discuss current workflow

touches.ai_summary: 16-minute qualification call with Levi (VP of CS). Discussed current pain points around lack of visibility into customer health and renewal pipeline. SwiftPartners uses basic CRM tracking but lacks conversational intelligence. Levi mentioned they're also evaluating Chorus. Team of 34, looking for 6 seats initially for CS and sales leadership.

questions_asked.question: Does AskElephant integrate with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and can sync call data automatically.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for tracking customer conversations and pipeline risk?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual notes in CRM after calls. No automated sentiment tracking or pattern detection.

next_steps: Include RevOps analyst Ivy in next conversation

touches.ai_summary: 36-minute discovery call with Levi. Deep dive into pipeline visibility needs - specifically tracking renewal risk signals and automating CS workflows. Discussed unlimited automation tier to support their workflow needs. Levi highlighted that Chorus is expensive and more sales-focused. He's champion but mentioned needing to involve leadership eventually. Ivy (RevOps) joined last 10 minutes to discuss technical requirements.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation tier differ from Chorus? They quoted us for much more than 6 seats.
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation includes AI-powered workflows and insights without per-seat pricing on automation features. More CS-friendly pricing model.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the decision process?
questions_asked.answer: Probably just need final sign-off from our CEO, but I can drive this internally.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks from contract signature to full rollout for a team your size.

objections.objection: We're in budget planning and need to move quickly. Timing is tight for this quarter.

next_steps: Send custom proposal for 6 seats with unlimited automation

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with proposal attached. Outlined $4,800 ACV pricing for 6 seats with unlimited automation tier (22.5% discount applied to meet their budget constraints). Referenced Chorus comparison and highlighted CS-specific features. Levi responded asking to discuss pricing details and discount structure on a call.

questions_asked.question: Can you walk me through how you got to this pricing? Want to make sure I can explain the discount internally.
questions_asked.answer: Happy to - let's schedule a quick call to review the breakdown and discuss contract terms.

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute pricing call with Levi. Discussed discount structure (22.5% off to meet budget) and contract terms. Levi confirmed budget approved on his end and wants to move forward. Asked about payment terms and quarterly vs annual billing. Rep noted no executive sponsor has been engaged yet. Levi said he has authorization to sign but will loop in CEO for visibility. Some hesitation around annual commit vs quarterly.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly billing instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: The pricing we discussed is based on annual commit. Quarterly would be roughly 15% higher per quarter.

questions_asked.question: Should we include your CEO in a brief intro call before finalizing?
questions_asked.answer: Probably not necessary - I can brief them offline. Let's keep momentum.

objections.objection: Annual payment upfront is tough with our cash flow. Need to discuss quarterly options internally.

next_steps: Levi to confirm payment terms with finance
Target signature by end of week
